channel.title: Cariboo Signals
channel.copyright: © 2026 Erich Zirnhelt. Licensed under CC BY-NC 4.0.
channel.itunes:subtitle: Technology and society in rural BC with Riley and Casey
channel.itunes:author: Riley and Casey
channel.itunes:summary: How do rural communities grow alongside technology? Daily conversations about responsible tech progress in the Cariboo region on the traditional territories of the Secwépemc, Tŝilhqot'in, and Dakelh nations. Riley brings tech systems thinking with rural roots, while Casey focuses on community development. New episodes every day with weekly themes.
channel.description: How do rural communities grow alongside technology? Daily conversations about responsible tech progress in the Cariboo region on the traditional territories of the Secwépemc, Tŝilhqot'in, and Dakelh nations.

item.title: Resilient Rural Futures
item.description: How do rural communities grow alongside technology? Daily conversations about responsible tech progress in the Cariboo region on the traditional territories of the Secwépemc, Tŝilhqot'in, and Dakelh nations. Today's focus: Resilient Rural Futures DEEP DIVE: Deep dive on Resilient Rural Futures Topics: broadband, fiber, connectivity, telemedicine, AI Sources cited in this episode: 1. Al Jazeera English: [Al Jazeera English] Cuba: Technological Disobedience 2. XDA Developers: [XDA Developers] This device running ESPHome quietly runs my... 3. NYT Top Stories: [NYT Top Stories] The Secret of How Ukraine’s Lifesaving Air... 4. The Tech Buzz: [The Tech Buzz] Google locks in 1.9GW clean energy deal with... 5. XDA Developers: [XDA Developers] I turned my old phone into a sound sensor, ... 6. Williams Lake Tribune: [Williams Lake Tribune] Business leaders give B.C. budget un... 7. Resilience.org: [Resilience.org] Small-scale supply chains in action 8. Quesnel Cariboo Observer: [Quesnel Cariboo Observer] Uber coming to 100 Mile House thi... 9. XDA Developers: [XDA Developers] Home Assistant's latest beta finally turns ... 10. My Cariboo Now: [My Cariboo Now] Emergency Services at 100 Mile District Gen... --- Credits --- Theme Song: Cariboo Signals by Sumo AI (suno.com) Content Curation & Script: Claude (Anthropic) TTS Voices: OpenAI TTS API Cover Art: ChatGPT (OpenAI) Podcast Coordination: Erich Zirnhelt © 2026 Erich Zirnhelt. Licensed under CC BY-NC 4.0. https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc/4.0/

Today's focus: Cariboo Voices And Local News DEEP DIVE: Deep dive on Cariboo Voices & Local News Topics: satellite, telemedicine, AI, infrastructure, maintenance Sources cited in this episode: 1. Toms Guide: [Toms Guide] I tested Reddit’s favorite gaming headsets on 7... 4. XDA Developers: [XDA Developers] KDE Plasma 6.7.0 will make managing your pr... 5. The Economic Times: [The Economic Times] Odisha mobilises over 5,000 MSMEs in cl... 6. Hackaday: [Hackaday] Electric Jeep With Modified Prius Hardware 7. Toms Guide: [Toms Guide] 7 ways AI can make remote work more productive ... 8. TechRadar: [TechRadar] Forget solid-state batteries – researchers have ... 9. My Cariboo Now: [My Cariboo Now] B.C. paramedics union reaches agreement wit... 10. Toms Guide: [Toms Guide] I tested the 'Death Star of speakers' for a wee... 11. TipRanks: [TipRanks] Nscale Targets Telecom Opportunities in Sovereign... --- Credits --- Theme Song: Cariboo Signals by Sumo AI (suno.com) Content Curation & Script: Claude (Anthropic) TTS Voices: OpenAI TTS API Cover Art: ChatGPT (OpenAI) Podcast Coordination: Erich Zirnhelt © 2026 Erich Zirnhelt. Licensed under CC BY-NC 4.0. https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc/4.0/

item.title: Wild Spaces And Outdoor Life
item.description: How do rural communities grow alongside technology? Daily conversations about responsible tech progress in the Cariboo region on the traditional territories of the Secwépemc, Tŝilhqot'in, and Dakelh nations. Today's focus: Wild Spaces And Outdoor Life DEEP DIVE: Is advancing technology genuinely improving backcountry safety accessibility for rural communities, or is it creating new barriers and false confidence? Topics: Technology equity and affordability barriers, Rural connectivity and infrastructure challenges, Training program sustainability and access, Technology literacy versus traditional backcountry skills, Community-based implementation strategies Sources cited in this episode: 1. Boing Boing: [Boing Boing] Amazing camera trap footage represents hope fo... 2. Android Authority: [Android Authority] Amazfit just launched its biggest watch ... 3. NYT Top Stories: [NYT Top Stories] Another Storm Complicates Efforts to Recov... 4. Quesnel Cariboo Observer: [Quesnel Cariboo Observer] B.C. skiers cautioned after split... 5. NYT Top Stories: [NYT Top Stories] After Avalanche Warnings, a Sierra Nevada ... 6. NYT Top Stories: [NYT Top Stories] In Lake Tahoe Avalanche Recovery, the Safe... 7. Lifehacker: [Lifehacker] This iPhone Feature Can Save Your Life in an Em... 8. TechRadar: [TechRadar] Forget the Samsung Galaxy Watch Ultra 2 — the Am... 9. TechRadar: [TechRadar] Garmin Fenix 9 incoming? CEO Cliff Pemble teases... 10. NYT Top Stories: [NYT Top Stories] What You Need to Know About Avalanche Safe... --- Credits --- Theme Song: Cariboo Signals by Sumo AI (suno.com) Content Curation & Script: Claude (Anthropic) TTS Voices: OpenAI TTS API Cover Art: ChatGPT (OpenAI) Podcast Coordination: Erich Zirnhelt © 2026 Erich Zirnhelt. Licensed under CC BY-NC 4.0. https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc/4.0/
